items.title: Maintain visible Google source proof
items.question: Do the visible account, workbook title and last-edit evidence still show no source change without connector fallback?

items.title: Track work-rhythm delta
items.question: Does the aggregate continue above 74 people and 482 signals, and which safe category explains the change?

items.title: Draft automation AI-security checklist
items.question: Can FSC zero-trust, shift-left, SBOM and incident-sharing guidance become a one-page automation control check?

items.title: Build migrant remittance check card
items.question: What launch, fee, limit and complaint details are available for a safe plain-language card?

items.title: Review variable-rate insurance disclosure
items.question: Does the official comparison table support a four-part consumer reading card?

items.title: Deconstruct stock gift onboarding
items.question: Which task and disclosure patterns transfer without equating account opening with education outcomes?
